# ITLibPlaylistPropertyParentPersistentID

**Global Variable**

The unique persistent identifier of the playlist’s parent playlist.

## Declaration

```swift
let ITLibPlaylistPropertyParentPersistentID: String
```

## Related Documentation

- **parentID**: The unique persistent identifier of the playlist’s parent playlist.

## Playlist Properties

- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyAllItemsPlaylist**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the API exposes every item in the playlist.
- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyDistinguisedKind**: An indication of whether the playlist has a special distinction.
- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyItems**: The media items (tracks) in the playlist.
- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyKind**: An indication of the type of playlist.
- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyPrimary**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist is the primary playlist.
- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyName**: The name or title of the playlist.
- **ITLibPlaylistPropertyVisible**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist is visible to the user in iTunes.
